job_description: Manager / Sr. Manager - HR & Admin : OMNIA CORPORATION Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List OMNIA CORPORATION Manager / Sr. Manager - HR & Admin Application Deadline : 06 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Age: 30 to 50 years Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 24 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 30 to 50 years What We’re Looking For: A dedicated learner with a keen desire to grow and improve continuously. A problem-solver who enjoys taking on challenges and finding innovative solutions. Strong communication and leadership skills, with the ability to inspire and manage a team. Ability to thrive under pressure and maintain focus in a fast-paced environment. A mindset that aligns with a growing organisation, adaptable to change and eager to contribute to its success. Responsibilities & Context We require a qualified and experienced management professional to efficiently oversee the growing operations of our organization. The selected candidate will supervise the overall activities of the company and assume full responsibility in the absence of the General Manager. The candidate must possess strong leadership, strategic decision-making, and management skills. HR Responsibilities: Recruitment & Staffing, Employee Relations & Engagement, Policy & Compliance, Performance Management, Compensation & Benefits, HR Reporting & MIS. Admin Responsibilities: Office Administration, Sales Administration, Sales team support and Performance, Logistics & Support Services, Compliance & Legal Support, Health, Safety & Security, Management Support. Training Responsibilities: Train to Worker, Sales Force, Office stuff ( As per training need) Skills & Expertise Communication in English Suggested by Administration HR Policy HRIS/ HR Database Management Human Resource Management Labor Law Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill,Profit share,Performance bonus Lunch Facilities: Partially Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka Company Information OMNIA CORPORATION Follow More jobs from this company Address: Sheltech Ayaan Tower, Level 8, House 58, Road 11&06, Banani C/A, Dhaka 1213 Business: We do manpower placements effectively, saving you 50% time and effort. You  just need to shortlist the  candidates and we shall do the rest. Excellent communication and negotiation skills. Strong presentation and client-handling abilities. Team-oriented and positive attitude Responsibilities & Context Sales & Revenue Growth Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve monthly and annual revenue targets. Lead, monitor, and motivate the corporate sales, shop sales and online sales team to ensure consistent performance. Identify new business opportunities, corporate clients, and key accounts. Maintain strong relationships with customers. Prepare monthly, quarterly, and yearly sales targets. Analyze market trends and competitor activities. Marketing & Brand Development Plan and implement integrated marketing strategies (digital, online, offline, corporate branding). Oversee promotional campaigns, exhibitions, corporate presentations, and client events. Strengthen brand positioning and visibility in the different food market. Monitor ROI of marketing campaigns. Business Development Analyze market trends, competitors, and customer needs to drive growth strategies. Prepare proposals, costing strategies, presentations, and contract negotiations. Coordinate closely with design, estimation, and purchase teams to ensure accurate commitments. Leadership & Reporting Recruit, train, and develop sales & marketing team members. Set KPIs, evaluate performance, and prepare regular MIS and sales reports. Report directly to top management with insights and growth recommendations.
